title: All Publications
About
text: This website automatically aggregates publications from members of the UK & Ireland Physics Higher Education Research (PER-HE) community. Rather than manually maintaining a list that quickly becomes outdated, we use ORCID profiles to keep the publication list current.

title: About
text: This website automatically aggregates publications from members of the UK & Ireland Physics Higher Education Research (PER-HE) community. Rather than manually maintaining a list that quickly becomes outdated, we use ORCID profiles to keep the publication list current.

title: About
text:
How it works

Author list: Researchers in the community share their ORCID identifier, which is added to a CSV file in this repository.
Automated fetching: A weekly GitHub Actions workflow runs a Python script that queries the ORCID public API for each author’s publications.
Deduplication: Papers appearing on multiple authors’ profiles (collaborations) are merged into a single entry using their DOI.
PER classification: Papers are automatically tagged as Physics Education Research based on the journal name and title keywords.
Website generation: Quarto renders the data into this searchable, browsable website, deployed automatically to GitHub Pages.

title: About
text:
Limitations

Only works added to an author’s ORCID profile will appear here.
Metadata quality depends on how entries were added to ORCID.
There is up to a 7-day delay between an ORCID update and this site updating.

title: About
text:
Getting listed
If you are a member of the UK & Ireland PER community and would like your publications included, please contact us via per-he.org with your ORCID identifier.

title: About
text:
Source code
The source code for this site is available on GitHub. It is written in Python and Quarto, and runs entirely on free GitHub infrastructure.

title: About
text:
Acknowledgements
This site was inspired by the MVLS Learning, Teaching and Scholarship Network publications page, which demonstrated this approach for a different research community. We are grateful to its authors for making their source code openly available.

Data sourced from ORCID

title: Authors
PER-HE Publications
text:
This site automatically lists publications from members of the UK & Ireland Physics Higher Education Research community.
Publications are fetched weekly from researchers’ ORCID profiles and updated automatically. Papers are tagged as Physics Education Research (PER) based on the journal they appear in or keywords in the title.
👉 Browse all publications
👉 See all contributing authors

To have your publications listed here, please send your ORCID identifier to the site maintainer, or visit per-he.org for more information.
